commands.bob-compass.waypoints.list.head: Waypoints:
commands.bob-compass.whitelist.list.head: Whitelisted players:
bob-compass.config.name: Config
bob-compass.config.require_compass.name: Render compass bar
bob-compass.config.require_compass.toolt: When to render the compass bar.
bob-compass.config.compass_color.name: Compass waypoint color
bob-compass.config.compass_color.tooltip: The color for the compass waypoint marker.
bob-compass.config.ping_color.name: Ping waypoint color
bob-compass.config.ping_color.tooltip: The color for the ping waypoint.
bob-compass.config.y_offset.name: Compass bar Y offset
bob-compass.config.y_offset.tooltip: The offset from the top of the screen, in pixels, of the compass bar.
bob-compass.config.waypoint_mode.name: Waypoint marker mode
bob-compass.config.waypoint_mode.tooltip: The mode of the display of the waypoint marker. Never to never display, Ping to display all ping markers, Waypoint to display the selected waypoint marker, Both to display both all ping markers and the selected waypoint marker.
bob-compass.config.share_ping.name: Share ping
bob-compass.config.share_ping.tooltip: Whether to automatically share pings in chat.
bob-compass.config.waypoint_render_dista: How far to render the waypoint marker. Set to -1 to render arbitrarily far.
bob-compass.config.left_side_display.too: The info to display on the left side below the compass bar.
bob-compass.config.side_display.heading: Heading
bob-compass.config.right_side_display.to: The info to display on the right side below the compass bar.
bob-compass.config.enable_whitelist.name: Enable whitelist
bob-compass.config.enable_whitelist.tool: Whether to enable the whitelist for accepting pings. Note: if the server has a custom chat plugin, this may need to be turned off.
bob-compass.config.whitelist_names.name: Whitelisted names
bob-compass.config.suppress_messages.too: Whether to replace server-sent waypoint messages with shorter ones.
